steps.title: Use the defining phrase
steps.content: The sentence explains the blank with "gathering pieces of it to bring back to Earth." The needed verb must mean taking or gathering a sample from Bennu's surface.

steps.title: Choose the gathering verb
steps.content: Choice A means fastened, not gathered. Choice C means went after or tracked. Choice D means substituted something for something else. The remaining choice matches the idea of gathering surface material for return to Earth. The answer is B.
